title: 4DRC V13 Drone for kids Adults with 1080P HD FPV Camera, Foldable Mini RC Quadcopter With Waypoint, Functions,Headless Mode,Altitude Hold,Gesture Selfie,3D Flips,Beginners Toys Gifts
features: 【1080P Drone & Wi-Fi Real Time Transmission Function】4DRC V13 drone with camera 1080P for kids adult beginners, HD FPV Camera captures great pictures and videos at any time and saves them directly! Record wonderful moments for you all the time, you can share the amazing view through social media with just one click.

【Longer Fly】The mini drones with 2 optimized modular batteries included, a total of 26-minute flight time is available, modular design and USB charging cable make charging more safe and convenient. At the same time, the drones with camera suitable for kids or Adults, it is both easy to manoeuvre and portable!

【Straightforward Operation】The Altitude Hold function enables the drone to fixed at current height. one key start/landing and headless mode guarantee the easiness of control. Fpv drone 3 Speed modes can satisfy both experienced and novice pilots.

【Fun Features】Just press a button you can try amazing 3D flip mode, fantastic rolls and circle makes the drone more attractive, With Waypoint functions, you can drawing a path at your will when the App is on, the kids drone will fly accordingly. Grasp the fly skills easily and quickly.

【Full Protection】Features with one key return, emergency stop, and 4 propeller guards to ensure a safe flight.Kids won’t be hurt by running propellers. And with the help of Emergency Stop, you can prevent the most urgent situations.
